name: Kang Boa Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Deep fry peanuts until golden and crunchy.
2. Cut chicken into cubes. Toss with egg, cornstarch, salt, and white pepper to taste. Set aside to marinate for 30 minutes.
3. Add oil to a wok and tilt the pan to distribute. When the temperature reaches 350°F (175°C), add chicken and stir fry until it is 80% tender. Drain.
4. Cut green onions into 1/2-inch pieces. Dry the wok, then add green onions, oil, ginger, and garlic. Stir fry for 1 minute, then add chicken and stir together.
5. Add sherry, soy sauce, sugar, chicken stock, white vinegar, and cornstarch dissolved in water. Stir in fried peanuts and continue to stir fry until the chicken is fully cooked.
6. Serve immediately with rice.
